configurations.name: marketing
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/marketing dev

configurations.name: marketing-preview
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/marketing preview --port 4321

configurations.name: extension-popup-preview
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/extension preview:popup

configurations.name: extension-options-preview
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/extension preview:options

configurations.name: storyboards
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/extension preview:storyboards

configurations.name: ui-storybook
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/ui storybook

configurations.name: marketing-storybook
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/marketing storybook

configurations.name: extension-storybook
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; exec pnpm --filter @movar/extension storybook

configurations.name: safari-host-app
runtimeArgs: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; pnpm --filter @movar/extension build:app-bundle && cd 'apps/extension/safari/Movar/Shared (App)/Resources' && exec python3 -m http.server 4399
